problem.card_title: Service businesses need websites that convert, not just exist.
problem.card_body: Your website is your digital storefront. If it's broken, confusing, or just plain ugly, potential clients will go to your competitor. Let's fix that.

process.headline: You do not pay first and hope for the best.
process.subheadline: Seeing your website before paying lowers your risk. We build it, you preview it, and you only move forward if you love it.

steps.title: 1. We build a demo
steps.description: We review your current site and create a tailored preview version completely risk-free.

steps.title: 2. We walk through it
steps.description: We hop on a quick call to show you the opportunity clearly and explain exactly how it will capture more leads.

steps.title: 3. You decide
steps.description: You only pay if you want to move forward. Zero pressure, pure opportunity.

care_plan.headline: The Monthly Care Plan
care_plan.body: A website shouldn't just be launched and abandoned. We keep your site live, maintained, supported, and updated so you can focus on running your business.
care_plan.side_card_body: We don't waste time. Most websites are completed within 24 to 72 hours after you officially move forward and provide the required information.
care_plan.side_card_secondary: This means you can start capturing leads faster, without the typical months-long agency wait times.

who_its_for.headline: Who We Build For
who_its_for.subheadline: HustleWave is specialized for local service businesses that need to turn traffic into booked jobs.

faqs_homepage.question: Why do you rebuild the website before payment?
faqs_homepage.answer: We believe in lowering the risk for you. Instead of asking you to pay first and hope for the best, we build a preview version. You see exactly what youâre getting, we walk you through it, and you only move forward if you like the direction.

faqs_homepage.question: What is included in the build?
faqs_homepage.answer: A custom, mobile-optimized, conversion-focused layout. We handle the service-based copywriting, core pages (Home, Services, About, Contact), contact forms, click-to-call setup, basic SEO, and 1 round of revisions before launch.

faqs_homepage.question: How fast can you launch?
faqs_homepage.answer: Most websites are completed and ready to launch within 24 to 72 hours after you officially move forward and provide the required information (like your business details and service list).

faqs_homepage.question: Do you guarantee leads?
faqs_homepage.answer: No. We build websites that are optimized to convert the traffic you get. We provide a massive improvement to trust, clarity, and conversion potential, but we cannot guarantee specific revenue or lead numbers.

final_cta.headline: Want to see what your website could look like before you pay?

footer.tagline: A conversion-focused website service for local service businesses. Built to get calls, leads, and booked jobs.
